goal: Write bilingual README files and add a one-click AX650 board installation script.
stack: Python adapters plus Docker Compose and POSIX shell board tooling
validation_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config && sh -n scripts/install_on_board.sh && git diff --check

requirement_alignment.goal: After the validated AX650 stack PR was merged, add bilingual user-facing documentation and a board-side one-click installer.
non_goals: Do not commit model artifacts or vendor caches.
Do not overwrite unrelated user changes such as AGENTS.md and plan.md.
Do not perform destructive board operations or automatically merge the PR.
expected_behavior: README.md is Chinese, README_EN.md is English, and both files provide language-switch links while explaining prerequisites, install flow, ports, Home Assistant setup, model paths, validation, and troubleshooting.
The board installer checks required tools and AX650 runtime mounts, prepares directories, optionally fetches sources and models, starts Compose services, and runs public smoke validation.
The installer supports dry-run, skip downloads, skip build, Home Assistant profile, and validation-only operation.
constraints_and_risks: Board network and disk space may vary; installer exposes skip options and a configurable free-space threshold.
Full install is intended to run on the AX650 board because it requires /soc. Dry-run can be exercised off-board.
acceptance_checks: README.md is written in Chinese, README_EN.md is written in English, and both documents link to each other for language selection on GitHub.

A board-side installer script checks required tools and AX650 runtime mounts, prepares model/source directories, optionally downloads assets, builds/starts Docker Compose services, and runs the public smoke check.
The installer supports non-destructive options such as dry-run, skip downloads, skip build, Home Assistant profile, and validation-only usage.
Local validation passes with pytest, compose config, shell syntax checks, and diff whitespace checks.
requirement_alignment.validation_approach: Run local pytest, docker-compose config, shell syntax checks, dry-run checks, and optionally board-side dry-run if the current board checkout is reachable.
requirement_alignment.first_iteration_scope: Single documentation/tooling iteration: README.md, README_EN.md, scripts/install_on_board.sh, tests/test_install_on_board.py.

assumptions: The PR target branch is main.
The installer should run from the repository root on the board.
Model and vendor artifacts remain ignored and are not staged.

issues.title: docs[1]: add Chinese README and board installer
acceptance_checks: README.md is written in Chinese, README_EN.md is written in English, and both documents link to each other for language selection on GitHub.

A board-side installer script checks required tools and AX650 runtime mounts, prepares model/source directories, optionally downloads assets, builds/starts Docker Compose services, and runs the public smoke check.
The installer supports non-destructive options such as dry-run, skip downloads, skip build, Home Assistant profile, and validation-only usage.
Local validation passes with pytest, compose config, and shell syntax checks.

rounds.implementation_summary: Kept README.md as the Chinese GitHub entrypoint, added README_EN.md as the English version with language-switch links, added a non-destructive AX650 board installer with dry-run/skip/validate modes, and added tests for shell syntax plus dry-run behavior.

validation.evidence: Dry-run printed mkdir, compose ps, and public smoke_check commands without executing mutations.
No whitespace errors after README EOF fix.

validation.command: board sh -n scripts/install_on_board.sh && MIN_FREE_MB=1 sh scripts/install_on_board.sh --dry-run --validate-only --smoke-timeout 1
validation.evidence: AX650N 10.126.35.158 reported /root free space 11934 MB and dry-run printed compose ps plus public smoke_check without starting services.
Both README.md and README_EN.md expose language-switch links.

rounds.test_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config && sh -n scripts/install_on_board.sh && git diff --check; board dry-run validate-only
rounds.test_summary: Local tests, compose config, shell syntax, diff whitespace, bilingual README link check, and AX650N board dry-run validation passed.
rounds.commit: HEAD commit on feat/build-20260630-readme-install; final hash is reported by git/PR.
rounds.commit_message: docs(iter-1): add bilingual README and board installer (#15)

gate_decision.rationale: Single requested documentation/tooling slice is complete and validated locally plus with a board-side dry-run.
